category_sources: source_facts.description identifies genact as a nonsense activity generator.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name and source_facts.homepage identify the project as genact.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage and source_facts.repo point to the official GitHub project; README is the best official documentation surface supplied.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already set to https://github.com/svenstaro/genact, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies a nonsense activity generator; source_facts.executables lists the genact command-line executable.
